title: VAT returns
body: We will prepare and submit VAT returns via Making Tax Digital (MTD) compatible software, reconcile VAT control accounts, and advise on VAT treatment of transactions.

title: Self Assessment
body: We will prepare and submit your Self Assessment tax return to HMRC, calculating tax liabilities and advising on payments on account where relevant.

title: MTD ITSA from April 2026
body: From April 2026, where your gross income exceeds £50,000, we will support quarterly digital updates, an End of Period Statement, and a Final Declaration under Making Tax Digital for Income Tax Self Assessment.

title: MTD ITSA from April 2027
body: From April 2027, where your gross income exceeds £30,000, we will support quarterly digital updates, an End of Period Statement, and a Final Declaration under Making Tax Digital for Income Tax Self Assessment.

title: P11D benefits in kind
body: We will prepare and submit P11D forms for directors and employees receiving taxable benefits, and advise on Class 1A National Insurance obligations.

title: R&D tax relief screening
body: We will review qualifying R&D expenditure and advise on SME or RDEC claims where applicable. Specialist R&D claim preparation may require a separate engagement.
